    "Pipe shoe is off its support member",
    "Improper alignment of piping support assembly"
  ],

    "Re-align the piping or adjust the support location to ensure the shoe rests fully on the structural support member",
    "Verify thermal expansion travel clearance to prevent the shoe from slipping off the support in the future"

  "rationale": "The pipe shoe has slipped off its structural support member. This creates an unstable condition, concentrates stress on the piping, and violates standard installation practices where the shoe must fully bear on the support structure to allow for thermal movement.",
